subject: fix(router): remove stale basename="/sun-sea-o" left over from GitHub Pages
body:
The BrowserRouter still had basename="/sun-sea-o" from the GitHub Pages
deployment, but the app now deploys to Vercel at the root path. This
caused the router to fail matching "/" and render nothing — a blank
screen on every visit (reported via mobile debug pill).

Tags: bugfix, routing, deployment
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 5
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: deployment
Semver: patch

title: remove stale basename="/sun-sea-o" left over from GitHub Pages
